# Lezzet Coffee

> Specialty-grade Turkish coffee, freshly roasted in the USA.

Lezzet (Turkish for "flavor") is a specialty Turkish coffee brand based in Arizona. We source Ethiopian and Brazilian Arabica beans, roast them in small batches in the USA, and grind them to the traditional powder-fine consistency used in Turkish coffee for over 500 years.

## What We Sell

- **Lezzet Specialty Grade Turkish Coffee — Classic** — 12oz bag, freshly roasted Ethiopian + Brazilian Arabica blend, powder-fine grind, $19.99 on Shopify / $21.99 on Amazon
- **Lezzet Chocolate Turkish Coffee** — 12oz bag, chocolate-infused blend, $19.99
- **Lezzet Cinnamon Turkish Coffee** — 12oz bag, cinnamon-infused blend, $19.99
- **Lezzet Hazelnut Turkish Coffee** — 12oz bag, hazelnut-infused blend, $19.99
- Available at lezzetcoffee.com/shop (Shopify) and Amazon

## What Makes Us Different

- **Freshly roasted in the USA** — not imported pre-roasted from Turkey like most brands
- **Specialty grade** — SCA 80+ score, placing it in the top 3% of coffee worldwide
- **Ships within days of roasting** — you get peak freshness, not stale imports
- **100% Arabica, no additives** — pure coffee, ethically sourced
- **500 years of tradition** — brewed the same way since the Ottoman Empire using a cezve (Turkish coffee pot)

## Turkish Coffee Fortune Reading (Tasseography)

Lezzet embraces the ancient Turkish tradition of fortune reading from coffee grounds (fal/tasseography). After drinking, flip your cup upside down, let the grounds dry, and read the symbols. Our website includes a full symbol guide at lezzetcoffee.com/fortune.

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is Turkish coffee?**
Turkish coffee is an unfiltered brewing method where finely ground coffee is simmered in water using a small pot called a cezve. The grounds settle to the bottom of the cup, creating an intensely flavorful, thick-bodied coffee experience.

**How is Lezzet different from imported Turkish coffee?**
Most Turkish coffee in the US is imported pre-roasted from Turkey, often months old. Lezzet is freshly roasted in small batches in the USA and shipped within days. We use specialty-grade beans (SCA 80+) — the same quality standard as premium third-wave coffee.

**What grind size is Turkish coffee?**
Turkish coffee uses the finest grind of any brewing method — finer than espresso. Lezzet comes pre-ground to the exact powder-fine consistency needed.

**Does Turkish coffee have more caffeine than regular coffee?**
Turkish coffee has roughly 25mg of caffeine per ounce — about 50% more than drip coffee per ounce. A typical 2oz serving has about 50mg of caffeine.
